disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.contentText1: As a service provider, MIRYA GmbH is responsible for its own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 Abs. 1 TMG.
disclaimer.contentText2: If we become aware of any legal violations, such content will be removed immediately.
disclaimer.linksText1: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no control.
disclaimer.linksText2: If we become aware of legal violations, such links will be removed immediately.

copyright.title: Copyright Notice
copyright.text1: All content and materials created and published by MIRYA GmbH on this website are protected under German copyright law.
copyright.text2: Downloads and copies of this website are permitted for private, non-commercial use only.
copyright.text3: Content originating from third parties is marked accordingly.
copyright.text4: If you notice any copyright infringement, please inform us so that we can remove such content immediately.
